title: abutilon haenkeanum
intro: Abutilon haenkeanum is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the yellow mallow or velvet leaf. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Abutilon haenkeanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Abutilon haenkeanum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to reap the medicinal benefits of the plant.
